step_1_execution_truth.verdict: CORRECT — side=BUY_YES stored faithfully in DB and returned by _fetch_trades

step_2_semantic_mapping.convention: BUY_YES → backed_team = slug[1] (away). Consistent with YES contract resolving if away team wins.
step_2_semantic_mapping.verdict: CORRECT — inferTeamsFromTrade produces correct backed_team for this trade

step_3_stream_payload.backed_team_in_payload: NOT PRESENT — _stream_positions_mark does not emit side, backed_team, faded_team, or away_team/home_team
step_3_stream_payload.payload_fields: market_slug, current_price, unrealized_pnl_usd, live_equity_usd, best_bid, best_ask, spread, source_ts, mark_source, game_status, inning, inning_half, outs, home_score, away_score, game_source_ts
step_3_stream_payload.pnl_formula: (current_price - entry_px) * qty — correct for both BUY_YES (tracked YES token) and BUY_NO (tracked NO token via no_token_id asset_id)
step_3_stream_payload.verdict: CORRECT — payload carries only mark/price data, no semantic side corruption here

step_4_card_render.verdict: CORRECT IF r.backed_team is valid — both use p.backed_team from inferTeamsFromTrade

step_5_merge_bug.what_markMap_contains: All fields from the PRIOR latestOpenPaperPositions, including semantic trade fields: side, backed_team, faded_team, held_contract_side, side_label, entry_px, qty, id
step_5_merge_bug.bug: When a trade closes and a NEW trade opens on the SAME market_slug with a DIFFERENT side, markMap still contains the OLD position's side/backed_team. The spread `...markMap.get(p.market_slug)` overwrites the freshly-built position's correct side/backed_team with stale values from the prior trade.
step_5_merge_bug.verdict: BUG CONFIRMED — this is the root cause of the operator-reported mismatch

corruption_path: 1. Trade #272 (BUY_NO) was open → latestOpenPaperPositions had { market_slug:'mlb-hou-sea-2026-04-10', side:'BUY_NO', backed_team:'SEA', faded_team:'HOU' }
2. Trade #272 closed (stop_loss). Trades API returns #272 as closed, #277 as open.
3. fetchTrades() → buildOpenPaperPositions builds new position correctly: { side:'BUY_YES', backed_team:'HOU', faded_team:'SEA' }
4. markMap = Map from latestOpenPaperPositions — still has old BUY_NO entry for 'mlb-hou-sea-2026-04-10'
5. Line 1139: { ...newBUY_YES, ...oldBUY_NO_markMap } = { side:'BUY_NO', backed_team:'SEA', ... } — OLD values OVERWRITE correct new values
6. Dashboard now shows 'SEA backed LOSE' for a position that is actually BUY_YES backing HOU to win
7. This corruption persists through all subsequent renderUnifiedPositions() cycles until a page reload

secondary_bug_found.verdict: NEVER MATCHES — open positions never appear in the Games tab 'OPEN POSITION' badge or 'Backed/Unrealized' display box
secondary_bug_found.severity: MEDIUM — separate from the backed_team mismatch; cosmetic but defeats the Games tab overlay feature entirely

layers_ruled_out.execution_truth: CLEAN — DB side field is authoritative and correct
layers_ruled_out.dashboard_server_payload_mapping: CLEAN — _fetch_trades returns correct side; _stream_positions_mark does not touch side/backed_team
layers_ruled_out.inferTeamsFromTrade_semantics: CLEAN — BUY_YES→away backed, BUY_NO→home backed is consistently correct in both inferTeamsFromTrade and tradeTeams functions
layers_ruled_out.stream_pnl_formula: CLEAN — (current_price - entry_px)*qty correct for both sides since BUY_NO tracks no_token_id asset

true_held_side_for_traced_trades.trade_276: BUY_YES — holds YES contracts on mlb-tex-lad. TEX (away) should be shown as backed. CORRECTLY labeled under current state (no prior BUY_NO on this slug in current session).
true_held_side_for_traced_trades.trade_277: BUY_YES — holds YES contracts on mlb-hou-sea. HOU (away) should be shown as backed. POTENTIALLY MIS-LABELED due to merge bug (prior BUY_NO trade #272 on same slug).

root_cause_conclusion: The backed-team mismatch is introduced at dashboard.html renderUnifiedPositions() line 1139 — the merge `{ ...p, ...(markMap.get(p.market_slug) || {}) }` spreads ALL fields from the prior latestOpenPaperPositions (including semantic trade fields side, backed_team, faded_team) over freshly-built positions. When a trade closes and a new trade opens on the same market_slug with a different side, the stale semantic fields from the old position permanently overwrite the correct fields of the new position until page reload. Execution truth and all server-side payload mapping are clean.

recommended_next_fix_target.fix: Replace the full-object spread merge with a field-specific merge that only copies mark/price/game-state fields from markMap (current_price, current_price_stale, unrealized_pnl_usd, live_equity_usd, best_bid, best_ask, spread, source_ts, mark_source, game_status, inning, inning_half, outs, balls, strikes, home_score, away_score, game_source_ts) — never overwriting side, backed_team, faded_team, held_contract_side, side_label, entry_px, qty, id, ts_open from the old position.
recommended_next_fix_target.secondary_fix: renderGamesTab() openBySlug lookup key must strip the date suffix from p.market_slug so it matches the date-free key constructed from ESPN game data.

verification_performed: Traced trade #277 (mlb-hou-sea BUY_YES) end-to-end from DB execution truth through dashboard_server payload to dashboard.html merge logic. Confirmed prior BUY_NO trade #272 on same slug. Confirmed merge overwrites correct backed_team via line 1139 full-object spread. Confirmed persistence of corruption across render cycles.
restart_needed: N/A — read-only audit, no code changes
summary: Root cause confirmed: renderUnifiedPositions() line 1139 full-object spread overwrites freshly-built position semantics (side, backed_team, faded_team) with stale values from a prior trade on the same market_slug, causing persistent wrong-team display after any close+reopen on the same slug — execution truth and server payload are clean, the bug is entirely in the dashboard.html merge logic.
